app.name: TravelTalk
app.tagline: Survival phrases for short trips abroad.
app.description: A practical web app for learning essential survival phrases on the go.
brand.copy: Clear phrases, short lessons and quick revisions for everyday life abroad.
home.cheatsheetNote: The phrases you'll actually need. Change the target language in Settings.
home.categoriesNote: Start where you'll most likely use it
catalog.title: Phrase catalogue
catalog.note: Filter by topic, status or search in both languages.
practice.title: Practice
practice.note: Recall the answer in your head first, then reveal it.
practice.empty: Nothing left in this pack right now. Phrases marked as known won't return until you reset them.
practice.beforeReveal: Recall the answer first, then reveal it.
quiz.title: Quick quiz
quiz.note: Five short questions from the most common phrases.
quiz.intro: Pick the right target-language phrase for the prompt. The quiz uses the most common phrases from the catalogue.
quiz.introNote: You'll see the score at the end and can play again.
quiz.prompt: How do you say in the target language: {phrase}?
quiz.again: Want another round? Start the quiz again.
saved.hardNote: Keep these for the next round
progress.title: Progress
progress.note: What's locked in and what still needs work.
settings.title: Settings
settings.themeNote: Light and dark mode are saved in the browser.
settings.resetNote: Removes marked phrases, favorites and history from this browser.
settings.resetConfirm: Really wipe progress for the current target language?
settings.langNote: Pick the language you're learning and the language for the interface.
onboarding.title: Welcome to TravelTalk
onboarding.body: Pick the language of the country you're visiting and the language you'd like to read the app in. You can change both later.
phrase.unverifiedTitle: Translation generated by AI, awaiting native review.
